questions.q: To ensure HR compliance, what documentation practice is mandatory (Question 1)?

options.text: Keeping all employee records accurate and up-to-date in secured systems.
Keeping paper files on desks.
Sharing salary details with the whole team.
Deleting records once an employee leaves.
